title: Formalizing Latent Thoughts: Four Axioms of Thought Representation in LLMs
innovation_summary: Formalizing Latent Thoughts: Four Axioms of Thought Representation in LLMs: We introduce an axiomatic evaluation framework for latent thought representations in LLMs, comprising metrics that are independent of downstream benchmark scores and reveal representational failures that.
